name: Streaming Slow
description: Slow streaming simulation for testing scroll and animation behaviors

turns.userMessage: Give me a detailed quarterly sales report

content.text:
# Quarterly Sales Report

## Overview

Total revenue across all products for the fiscal year: **$121,800**

The product portfolio shows healthy growth across all three product lines, with Widget A maintaining its position as the flagship product.

## Performance by Product

### Widget A (Revenue Leader)

| Quarter | Revenue | QoQ Change |
|---------|---------|------------|
| Q1 | $12,500 | - |
| Q2 | $14,200 | +13.6% |
| Q3 | $11,800 | -16.9% |
| Q4 | $16,300 | +38.1% |
| **Total** | **$54,800** | |

Widget A accounts for **45.0%** of total revenue. Strong Q4 rebound after Q3 dip.

### Widget B (Steady Performer)

| Quarter | Revenue | QoQ Change |
|---------|---------|------------|
| Q1 | $8,900 | - |
| Q2 | $9,200 | +3.4% |
| Q3 | $10,100 | +9.8% |
| Q4 | $11,500 | +13.9% |
| **Total** | **$39,700** | |

Widget B shows the most **consistent growth** — no negative quarters. Accounts for **32.6%** of revenue.

### Widget C (Growth Star)

| Quarter | Revenue | QoQ Change |
|---------|---------|------------|
| Q1 | $5,600 | - |
| Q2 | $6,100 | +8.9% |
| Q3 | $7,200 | +18.0% |
| Q4 | $8,400 | +16.7% |
| **Total** | **$27,300** | |

Widget C is the **fastest-growing product** with 50% year-over-year growth (Q1 vs Q4). Accounts for **22.4%** of revenue.

## Quarterly Totals

| Quarter | Total Revenue | QoQ Change |
|---------|--------------|------------|
| Q1 | $27,000 | - |
| Q2 | $29,500 | +9.3% |
| Q3 | $29,100 | -1.4% |
| Q4 | $36,200 | +24.4% |

## Key Takeaways

1. **Q4 was the strongest quarter** at $36,200 (+24.4% QoQ)
2. **Q3 showed a slight dip** driven by Widget A's seasonal decline
3. **Widget C's trajectory** suggests it could surpass Widget B by mid-next-year
4. **Portfolio diversification** is improving — Widget A's share dropped from 46.3% (Q1) to 45.0% (full year) as other products grow faster

turns.userMessage: Now format that report and write it to the Summary sheet

content.text:
I've written the report to the **Summary** sheet with formatting:

- Title row merged and styled at 14pt bold
- Header row with blue background and white text
- Data rows with values and growth percentages

The report is ready for review.
